urdu transliteration text: KARBALA WALON PE YE KAISA MUHARRAM AAYA
english translation text: Alas! What Muharram has befallen upon the people of Karbala?

urdu transliteration text:
Drenched in blood, Abbas's flag has appeared
KHUN TAPAKTA HUWA ABBAS KE PARCHAM AAYA
JAISE JAISE MERE GHAZI KA ALAM JUKTAA GAYA
english translation text: As my Ghazi (H. Abbas's) alam kept falling to the ground

urdu transliteration text:
Hazrat Shabbir's back kept breaking because of the sorrow
PUSHT MEIN HAZRATE SHABBIR KA BHI KHAM AAAYA
KARBALA DEKHLE ISLAM BACHAANE KE LIYE
english translation text: O Kerbala, see how Islam is saved…

urdu transliteration text: SAATH KUMBE KO LIYE WAARIS E ADAM AAYA
english translation text: The inheritor of Adam has brought his entire family

urdu transliteration text: ZAALIMON ISKO TO DO BUNDH PILADO PAANI
english translation text: O oppressors, give him two sips of water at least

urdu transliteration text:
My six-month old (Ali Asghar) is almost dying of thirst
AB LABON PAR MERE BESHIR KAA HAI DAM AAYA

All seasons come and go, but…
SAARE MAUSAM TO GUZAR JAATE HAI AAKAR LAIKIN
BAS HAMESHA KE LIYE MAUSAM E MATAM AAYA
english translation text: The season of Maatam is here to stay forever

urdu transliteration text: KARBALA WALON PE YE KAISA MUHARRAM AAYA
english translation text: Alas! What Muharram has befallen upon the people of Karbala?

urdu transliteration text:
Drenched in blood, Abbas's flag has appeared
KHUN TAPAKTA HUWA ABBAS KE PARCHAM AAYA
